settings.title: Settings
settings.testNotifBody: This is a test notification from BetterU.
settings.upgradeSubtitle: Your wellness team for ~$5/week — AI coach, therapist, 43+ pro workouts, guided audio & more.
settings.alertErrorUpdateRestTime: Failed to update rest time. Please try again.
settings.alertPermissionNotificationsBody: Enable notifications in your device settings.
settings.alertSubscriptionMgmtBody:
To manage your subscription:

1. Open the App Store
2. Tap your profile icon
3. Tap "Subscriptions"
4. Find BetterU and manage your subscription
settings.alertPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.alertPasswordMustDiffer: New password must be different from your current password
settings.alertPasswordUpdateTimeout: Password update timed out. Please try again.
settings.alertPasswordUpdateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
settings.alertPasswordRequirementsHint: Password must be at least 6 characters long. For stronger security, include both letters and numbers.
settings.alertPasswordUpdated: Your password has been updated successfully
settings.alertUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
settings.alertInvalidPositiveNumber: Please enter a valid number greater than 0
settings.alertErrorUpdateGoal: Failed to update goal. Please try again.
settings.alertInvalidStrideBody: Enter a number between 0.5 and 1.2 meters.
settings.alertTestNotifSignIn: You need to be signed in to send a test notification.
settings.alertTestNotifFailed: Failed to send test notification. Please try again.
settings.alertPremiumRestTimerBody: Upgrade to Premium to customize your rest timer!
settings.alertDeleteAccountBody: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.spotifyVisibleHint: Music integration button is visible on your profile
settings.spotifyHiddenHint: Music integration button is hidden on your profile
settings.publicProfileOnDesc: Others can see your stats and activities
settings.publicProfileOffDesc: Your stats and activities are hidden
settings.strideModalHint: Typical range 0.5 – 1.2 m. Affects indoor/treadmill distance.
settings.restTimeHelpPremium: This rest time will be used for all workouts.
settings.restTimeHelpFree: Upgrade to Premium to customize your rest timer.
settings.strideSectionHelp: Used for Timed Distance in Indoor / Treadmill mode. Average is ~0.75 m; adjust for your height.
settings.deleteWarningIntro: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data, including:
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.
settings.reminderDefaultBody: Time for your daily workout and mental check-in.
settings.reminderFreshBody: You did {{days}} day(s) in a row — that's real progress. One short session counts.
settings.reminderAtRiskBody: One activity today keeps it going — a quick workout or 5-min mental session is enough.
settings.remindersEnabledPushBody: We will remind you every day at {{time}}.
